input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Pekko 2.0.0-M1 removed deprecated classic TypedActor APIs; existing 1.1.5 tests importing org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, or TypedProps will not compile. This is an API-update issue, not missing setup.

Tests that deliberately exercise internal DNS resolver behavior may need the existing --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED JVM/native-image option, but broad meaningful actor coverage does not require adding new setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property is required before meaningful Pekko actor coverage is reachable. The resolved 2.0.0-M1 artifact depends only on scala-library and com.typesafe:config, and normal usage is local ActorSystem/Props/config-based actor tests.
